title: F2-apply-broad-hook: replace IMPORT_RECOMMENDATION_BANNER constant in knowledge-hint-broad.cjs with lib call
description: Delete the hardcoded `IMPORT_RECOMMENDATION_BANNER` const at line 262-263 (`  📋 Fabric: 知识库稀疏，是否调 /fabric-import 从 git 历史与现有文档回灌知识?`) and replace its single use site with a call into the banner-i18n lib (`renderBanner('broadImportBanner', variant, {})`). Like TASK-002, read `fabric_language` ONCE per `main()` invocation via `readFabricLanguage(workspaceRoot)` and pass `variant` into the consumer. Preserve the leading two-space indent and the `📋 Fabric:` emoji prefix and the `/fabric-import` verbatim token (substring contract).

files.change: Add `const { renderBanner, readFabricLanguage } = require('./lib/banner-i18n.cjs');` near the top. Delete the IMPORT_RECOMMENDATION_BANNER const (lines 262-263). Resolve `variant` once in `main()` via `readFabricLanguage(workspaceRoot)`. Replace the const reference at the consumer site with `renderBanner('broadImportBanner', variant, {})`.

implementation: Locate the consumer of IMPORT_RECOMMENDATION_BANNER (single use site — grep for the constant name)
Add the require for `./lib/banner-i18n.cjs` alongside other top-level requires
Resolve `const variant = readFabricLanguage(workspaceRoot);` in main() / the entry function
Delete the now-unused const declaration at lines 262-263

reference.pattern: Same lib-require precedent as TASK-002; the broad hook already reads .fabric/fabric-config.json (line 74 FABRIC_CONFIG_FILE) so adding readFabricLanguage is a natural extension
reference.examples: TASK-002 establishes the pattern — TASK-003 is a smaller mirror application

criteria: File `packages/cli/templates/hooks/knowledge-hint-broad.cjs` no longer contains the literal `'知识库稀疏'` string (banner now flows through renderBanner)
All pre-existing tests under `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test -- knowledge-hint-broad` PASS (anti-regression: substring `'/fabric-import'` and `'📋 Fabric:'` prefix preserved)

Behavioral expectation: a workspace with `fabric_language: 'en'` now sees English broad-hook banner; default preserves prior Chinese text via match-existing→en fallback IF prior tests asserted Chinese (verify and update test if so)

rationale.chosen_approach: Same architecture as TASK-002 — resolve variant once, pass through. Smaller blast radius (single banner) so this task is mostly mechanical.
alternatives_considered: Skip TASK-003 and inline the lib call without deleting the const (rejected: leaves dead code)
decision_factors: Consistency with TASK-002 makes future banner additions uniform
Deleting the dead const keeps the file lint-clean
rationale.tradeoffs: Coupling between this hook and the lib means install pipeline must ship lib/banner-i18n.cjs to broad-hook installs too (verified in TASK-006 install integration check, but worth noting in commit message)

manual_checks: Trigger broad-hook underseeded path with `fabric_language: 'en'`, confirm English banner
Trigger broad-hook underseeded path with default config, confirm fallback to en (match-existing class 1 rule)
success_metrics: Existing knowledge-hint-broad tests pass without modification (or with cosmetic update if asserting Chinese-by-default)
